name: get-sum
description: Returns the sum of two numbers

name: get-env
description: Returns all environment variables, helpful for debugging MCP server configuration

name: toggle-simulated-logging
description: Toggles simulated, random-leveled logging on or off.

name: toggle-subscriber-updates
description: Toggles simulated resource subscription updates on or off.

name: trigger-long-running-operation
description: Demonstrates a long running operation with progress updates.

duration.description: Duration of the operation in seconds

steps.description: Number of steps in the operation

name: get-annotated-message
description: Demonstrates how annotations can be used to provide metadata about content.

messageType.description: Type of message to demonstrate different annotation patterns

includeImage.description: Whether to include an example image

name: get-structured-content
description: Returns structured content along with an output schema for client data validation

name: gzip-file-as-resource
description: Compresses a single file using gzip compression. Depending upon the selected output type, returns either the compressed data as a gzipped resource or a resource link.

data.description: URL or data URI of the file content to compress

outputType.description: How the resulting gzipped file should be returned. 'resourceLink' returns a link to a resource that can be read later, 'resource' returns a full resource object.

name: get-resource-links
description: Returns up to ten resource links that reference different types of resources

name: get-resource-reference
description: Returns a resource reference that can be used by MCP clients
